entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The primary cereal crop targeted for yield improvement in Mali

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: The country where the sorghum breeding program is implemented

entities.name: GENDER-RESPONSIVE BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach that integrates gender roles and preferences to increase adoption and productivity

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The efficiency of agricultural production, influenced by resource access and gender roles

entities.name: GENDER ROLES
entities.description: The social roles and responsibilities of men and women that shape knowledge and preferences in agriculture

entities.name: PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: The general process of developing new plant varieties with desired characteristics

entities.name: GENDER-SENSITIVE APPROACHES
entities.description: Approaches that recognize and account for gender differences in agricultural contexts

entities.name: PARTICIPATORY PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding method that involves farmers and end-users in the selection and development of varieties

entities.name: CASE STUDY METHODOLOGY
entities.description: The research approach used to analyze the evolution of the breeding program

entities.name: CULINARY TESTS
entities.description: Evaluation of crop varieties based on cooking and eating preferences

entities.name: PARTICIPATORY SELECTION
entities.description: The process of selecting crop varieties through the active involvement of diverse end-users

entities.name: ON-FARM TRIALS
entities.description: Field experiments conducted on farmers' fields to test variety performance

entities.name: SORGHUM YIELD
entities.description: The amount of sorghum produced per unit area, which the program aims to increase

entities.name: AGRONOMY
entities.description: The science of crop production and soil management

entities.name: SOCIAL SCIENCES
entities.description: The study of human society and social relationships, used to inform breeding programs

entities.name: CONTEXT-SPECIFIC BREEDING
entities.description: Breeding strategies tailored to the specific environmental and social conditions of a region

entities.name: LONG-TERM FUNDING
entities.description: Sustained financial support necessary for the success of breeding efforts
